text:
Erica Young, News Producer

Published:April 17, 2024 at 4:40 AM

Updated:April 17, 2024 at 6:45 PM

Recommended Videos

Erica Young, News Producer

It’s starting to get real.

We’ve had a lot of signs this week that the 2024 Summer Olympics is getting closer. The Team USA Media Summit was held this week in New York City, where KPRC 2′s Keith Garvin and Daniella Guzman got to interview some high-profile athletes.

Recommended Videos

On Tuesday, the ceremonial flame was lit at the birthplace of the Olympic games in Greece. And on Wednesday we hit a big countdown number: 100 days until the Olympic Games in Paris.

Everybody loves a countdown, right? But there’s no need to do the work yourself... we did it for you.

COUNTDOWN TO 2024 PARIS OLYMPICS

100 Days: April 17

1 Month: June 26

15 Days: July 11

14 Days: July 12

13 Days: July 13

12 Days: July 14

11 Days: July 15

10 Days: July 16

9 Days: July 17

8 Days: July 18

7 Days: July 19

6 Days: July 20

5 Days: July 21

4 Days: July 22

3 Days: July 23

2 Days: July 24

1 Day: July 25

Opening Ceremony: July 26

SOME OTHER KEY DATES TO MARK ON YOUR CALENDAR

Many athletes still have to compete in trials before even learning if they will qualify for the 2024 Games. The swimming trials will be held June 15-23 in Indianapolis, Indiana.

The diving trials will be held June 16-23 in Knoxville, Tennessee. Then, The track and field trials will be held June 21-30 in Eugene, Oregon.

Finally, the gymnastics trials will be held June 27-30 in Minneapolis, Minnesota.

COMPETITION DATES FOR MOST POPULAR EVENTS

Gymnastics will take place between July 27 and August 5.

Track and field events will be held between August 1 and August 11.

Followed by Swimming competitions from July 27 through August 4.

In the new Olympic sport Breaking, B-Boys and B-Girls, will battle on August 9 and 10.

MORE NUMBERS TO LOVE

Number of Sports: 39

Number of Events: 329

Number of Expected Athletes: 10,500

title: 100 Days to the 2024 Olympics in Paris: Full countdown and dates to lookout for
author: Erica Young
description: Are you as excited about the upcoming Olympics as we are? We're literally counting the days until the big day!
